purpose: Revise prompt for a failed maturity_level selection.
system_addendum:
SECTION YOU ARE REVISING: maturity_level

If value_in_enum failed: pick exactly foundational / scaling / mature.

If depends_on_deployment failed: principles that require a deployed system to operate against (drift baselines, production telemetry, multi-project portfolio) cannot be foundational. Use scaling for principles that need a deployed system; mature for cross-portfolio principles.

If parallel_with_siblings failed: align with the sibling pattern. The four siblings cluster at foundational (per-project discipline) except GO1B1-04 (scaling, needs deployment). Reflect this logic for the principle being authored.
user_template:
Revise this maturity_level.

<statement>{{ statement_title }}</statement>
<problem>{{ problem_description }}</problem>
<applicability>{{ applicability }}</applicability>
<siblings_maturity_levels>{{ sibling_maturity_levels }}</siblings_maturity_levels>
<failing_draft><maturity_level>{{ candidate_maturity_level }}</maturity_level></failing_draft>
<rubric_scores>
  <value_in_enum score="{{ score_value_in_enum }}">{{ justification_value_in_enum }}</value_in_enum>
  <depends_on_deployment score="{{ score_depends_on_deployment }}">{{ justification_depends_on_deployment }}</depends_on_deployment>
  <parallel_with_siblings score="{{ score_parallel_with_siblings }}">{{ justification_parallel_with_siblings }}</parallel_with_siblings>
</rubric_scores>

Return the JSON object specified in the output contract.

schema.maturity_level: string — one of: foundational / scaling / mature
